metadata.name: Cloud Notification
metadata.description: Deploys Azure Logic Apps for leak detection notifications with state tracking. The primary workflow subscribes to Event Hub ALERT_DLQC events, deduplicates using Azure Table Storage, and posts new-leak alerts to Microsoft Teams. A secondary workflow provides an HTTP endpoint to close active leak sessions. The Teams connection requires user consent after deployment via the Azure Portal.
Event Hub namespace reference.
Logic App workflow output shape returned by this module.
Resource group reference containing name, id, and location.
Storage account reference used for leak-session tracking table.
Prefix for all resources in this module
Location for all resources in this module
Environment for all resources in this module: dev, test, or prod
Instance identifier for naming resources: 001, 002, etc...
Common settings for the components.
The common component configuration.
Additional tags to add to the resources.
Resource group reference (name, id, location).
Event Hub namespace reference (id, name) for Logic App trigger.
Name of the Event Hub to subscribe to for leak events.
Storage account reference (id, name) for leak-session Table Storage.
Whether to create role assignments for the Logic App managed identities.
Teams chat or channel thread ID for posting notifications.
Teams posting location type.
Whether to opt out of telemetry data collection.

metadata.name: Leak Close Logic App
metadata.description: HTTP-triggered workflow that closes an active leak session and notifies Teams.

Instance identifier for naming resources: 001, 002, etc...

inputs.body: @{if(equals(actions('Delete_Entity')['status'], 'Succeeded'), 'Leak closed', if(equals(actions('Get_Leak_Session')['status'], 'Failed'), 'No active leak found for this device', 'Failed to close leak'))}

metadata.description: Logic App workflow resource ID.
Logic App workflow name.
System-assigned managed identity principal ID.
Callback URL for the HTTP trigger — passed into the notify workflow so the Teams message can include a close link.

metadata.name: Leak Notification Logic App
metadata.description: Subscribes to ALERT_DLQC events on Event Hub, deduplicates via Azure Table Storage, posts new-leak alerts to Teams.
Prefix for all resources in this module
Location for all resources in this module

Event Hub name to subscribe to for leak events.

body.messageBody:
[format('

🚨 Leak Detection Alert

Device: @{{body(''Parse_Leak_Event'')?[''source_device'']}}

Detected At: @{{utcNow()}}

Confidence: @{{body(''Parse_Leak_Event'')?[''inference_result'']?[''confidence'']}}

Model: @{{body(''Parse_Leak_Event'')?[''inference_result'']?[''model_name'']}}

Alert Level: @{{coalesce(body(''Parse_Leak_Event'')?[''enrichment'']?[''alert_level''], ''Unknown'')}}

Site: @{{coalesce(body(''Parse_Leak_Event'')?[''enrichment'']?[''site''], ''Unknown'')}} / @{{coalesce(body(''Parse_Leak_Event'')?[''enrichment'']?[''facility''], ''Unknown'')}}

✅ Close Leak

', parameters('closeLeakCallbackUrl'))]

metadata.description: Logic App workflow resource ID.
Logic App workflow name.
System-assigned managed identity principal ID — used for role assignments.

Logic App workflow resource details for the primary notification workflow.
